calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 Phase 3-corrected monomodal-collapse falsifier on SD-054 (gated_policy in optimizer + phased training + divergence probe + hardened C3)
items.note: Phase 3 corrections per arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md decision-log 2026-05-10: (A) gated_policy.parameters() in dedicated Adam during P1; (B) phased training P0 encoder warmup -> P1 frozen encoder + scaffolding diversification loss -> P2 eval; (C) behavioral-divergence probe with mid-P1 inert-gating short-circuit at MID_TRAINING_EP=30 (TV<0.05); (D) hardened C3 with transit_rate floor 0.05 + np.nanmean. P1 training pressure is scaffolding (NOT REINFORCE on env reward); full REINFORCE deferred to Phase 3 GAP-C/D when discriminator wires into SD-033a.

items.title: MECH-314 (ARC-065) structured_curiosity_bonus substrate-readiness diagnostic (parent + 314a striatal novelty + 314b frontopolar uncertainty + 314c learning-progress)
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic for MECH-314 cluster (parent + 3 sub-flavours). Five UCs: UC1 instantiation; UC2 master-OFF backward-compat (curiosity is None); UC3 sub-flavour flag-set isolation -- 314a-only / 314b-only / 314c-only / all-off-master-on each behave correctly (this is the architectural prerequisite making Q-044 three-arm ablation a flag-set decision); UC4 select_action wiring contract (compute_score_bias invoked once per tick, bias lands additively in dacc_score_bias chain, e3._running_variance feeds 314b); UC5 MECH-094 simulation gate (compute_score_bias returns zeros + skip-only; update_prediction_error no-op on LP buffer). Phase 1 honest scoping: 314a per-candidate via RBF distance to ResidueField centers; 314b/c broadcast scalars (e3._running_variance + EMA |PE_t-PE_{t-K}|), per-candidate refinement deferred to Phase 2 follow-on. Behavioural Q-044 three-arm ablation queued AFTER substrate landing AND MECH-318/319 absorption checks complete.

items.title: MECH-319 (arc_062 GAP-K) simulation_mode_rule_write_gate substrate-readiness diagnostic
items.note: Substrate-readiness diagnostic for MECH-319 simulation_mode_rule_write_gate (substrate-level instantiation of MECH-094 at the rule-arbitration layer). Six UCs: UC1 forward-pass instantiation + canonical diagnostic keys; UC2 master-OFF backward-compat (gate is None); UC3 truth-table coverage across the 6 valid (master, admit_writes, caller_sim) combinations; UC3b precondition raises ValueError on admit_writes=True without master ON (loud-not-silent guard); UC4 select_action wiring contract (gated_policy + lateral_pfc call sites consult the gate at integration time, n_simulation_* counters remain zero on the waking path); UC5 MECH-094 invariance (master-OFF and master-ON-with-waking-caller produce bit-identical wiring outputs; asymmetry surfaces only at caller_sim=True). Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R1 GENUINE-NOVELTY-CONFIRMED + Pull 4 R3 KEEP-AS-IS verdicts (do NOT modify MECH-094) are architectural commitments encoded in the substrate, not signals tested here. Behavioural V3-EXQ-543c-successor (admit_writes=True falsifier with replay-driven invocation predicting monomodal-collapse re-emergence) is queued AFTER MECH-313 / MECH-314 / MECH-318 sibling substrates land.

items.title: SD-049 BG gating wider-seed sweep under StepHarness, Tier-1 diagnostic re-run after V3-EXQ-514g interruption (supersedes V3-EXQ-514g)
items.note: Next-letter re-run after V3-EXQ-514g phantom-PASS. The 2026-05-08T19:26Z 514g run on ree-cloud-1 was killed by SIGTERM mid-seed-43 at ep ~70/90 (systemd shutdown signal); the runner's stdout-derived heuristic logged phantom PASS 4 seconds later. 514g flipped to INTERRUPTED in REE_assembly 13c142debb (2026-05-10). Script logic and design unchanged from 514g; only QUEUE_ID/EXPERIMENT_TYPE/SUPERSEDES updated. Dry-run smoke PASS on Mac (1 seed x 3 episodes, 108s, BG gate fired, rv evolved off init).
